top_posts.text: I built a Threads account that writes, posts, and improves without me touching it. It uses the official Meta API. Free tools. One-time setup. And yes, you’re reading a post it wrote right now.

Most creators waste hours manually posting every day. Instead, build a feedback loop:  
Post → Read analytics → Let AI rewrite tomorrow’s content based on what worked.  

I set this up once with free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs). It now runs itself. No daily grind.  

That’s the whole trick. One setup, zero upkeep.

3 things that make hands-free Threads growth actually work:

1. The official Meta Threads API gives you full posting power — no shady automation, no account risk.
2. A one-time 2-hour setup using free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs) runs forever at $0/month.
3. It reads its own analytics daily and rewrites tomorrow’s posts to be better. That loop is the real lever.
4. (Bonus) Tokens refresh themselves. You never log in again.

No daily grind. No expensive SaaS. Just a system...

3 things nobody tells you about hands-off Threads growth:

1. The official Threads API exists and is free — no shady bots, no browser hacks.
2. A single 2-hour setup with GitHub Actions + free AI tools posts forever. Zero monthly cost.
3. The system reads your own analytics daily and writes better posts tomorrow. It's a loop that compounds.
4. (Bonus) Token refresh? Also automated. You literally never log in again.

Full setup guide in my bio.

Waking up to 7 draft posts written from yesterday’s best performers.  
No alarm for “content time.” No panic about what to say.  

Before: 2 hours a day guessing, burning out, going silent on weekends.  
After: 2 hours one Saturday, then it runs itself. Writes, posts, studies analytics, gets smarter.  

Same account. Same audience. One decision changed everything.
